title: SWD Eagles celebrate its top players of 2024 season
description: RUGBY NEWS - The Phangela SWD Eagles held...
bodyText:
Gallery

RUGBY NEWS - The Phangela SWD Eagles held their awards ceremony on Thursday 25 July to celebrate their top achievers.


> In the Carling Currie Cup First Division, the Eagles managed to progress up to the semi-finals where they narrowly lost 25-24 to the Boland Cavaliers.


The Eagles have finished play for the 2024 season and all the players' contracts expired yesterday, 31 July.

PHOTO GALLERY: SWD Eagles celebrate it's top players of 2024 season

Those involved in club rugby will continue to play in that capacity. The president of the SWD Rugby Union, Ben Brinkhuis, said contract negotiations will start in November to sign players for the 2025 season.

Phangela SWD Eagles Rugby Player of the Year - Rosco Syster Photo: MRREE STUDIOS

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
